scripts.dev:server: cd server && npx ts-node-dev --no-notify -r dotenv/config app | npx pino-pretty
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run start:client" "npm run start:server"
scripts.build-client: cd client && npx tsc -b tsconfig.json && npx vite build
scripts.build-server: cd server && npm i && npx tsc && cd .. && npx -y cpy-cli server/package.json server/package-lock.json dist --flat && (cd dist && npm i --no-audit --no-fund)
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run create-dist-folder && npm run build-client && npx -y cpy-cli "client/build/**" dist/client --cwd=. --parents && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('client/build', { recursive: true, force: true })" && npm run build-server
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test && npx prettier --check .
